title: Mesmerizing Da De Los Muertos Celebration Unfolding
sourceTitle: Mesmerizing Da De Los Muertos Celebration Unfolding
prompt: A mesmerizing Día de los Muertos celebration unfolding through the streets of an ancient Mexican town at midnight, elegant skeletal dancers in richly embroidered traditional garments spinning beneath glowing papel picado banners and endless candlelight, ornate sugar skull face designs with vibrant marigold petals woven into crowns and costumes, musicians playing beside towering altars covered in candles, roses, incense smoke, and offerings, swirling dresses creating dramatic motion and color, glowing lanterns reflecting across cobblestone streets, cinematic atmosphere filled with warm amber light, deep shadows, drifting smoke, intricate skull details, emotional celebration of life and death, ultra-detailed textures, vibrant Mexican folk artistry blended with dark fantasy realism, masterpiece composition, cinematic 8k --ar 2:3 --v 8.1
originalPrompt: A mesmerizing Día de los Muertos celebration unfolding through the streets of an ancient Mexican town at midnight, elegant skeletal dancers in richly embroidered traditional garments spinning beneath glowing papel picado banners and endless candlelight, ornate sugar skull face designs with vibrant marigold petals woven into crowns and costumes, musicians playing beside towering altars covered in candles, roses, incense smoke, and offerings, swirling dresses creating dramatic motion and color, glowing lanterns reflecting across cobblestone streets, cinematic atmosphere filled with warm amber light, deep shadows, drifting smoke, intricate skull details, emotional celebration of life and death, ultra-detailed textures, vibrant Mexican folk artistry blended with dark fantasy realism, masterpiece composition, cinematic 8k --ar 2:3 --v 8.1
